# Driftwood Tiny Homes

> Driftwood Tiny Homes designs and builds handcrafted, fixed-price tiny homes on wheels from Shellharbour, NSW, servicing the Illawarra, South Coast and Southern Highlands.

## About
- Local, Shellharbour-based tiny home builder, established 2023.
- Three standard floor plans, all fully customisable:
  - The Bellambi — 6.0m, 1 bedroom, sleeps 2, from AUD $74,000
  - The Killalea — 8.4m, 2 bedroom, sleeps 4, from AUD $118,000
  - The Windang — 7.2m, 1 bedroom + study nook, sleeps 3, from AUD $95,000
- Fixed-price contracts, 10–14 week builds, engineer-certified and road-registered.
- Process: free design consult, fixed-price contract with engineering sign-off, build with weekly updates, delivery and site setup.

## Service area
Shellharbour, Wollongong, Kiama, Nowra, Jervis Bay, Southern Highlands, NSW, Australia.

## Contact
- Phone: (02) 4295 0173
- Email: hello@driftwoodtinyhomes.com.au
- Address: Shellharbour, NSW 2529
